tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control, and elevated total cholesterol and LDL cholesterol, which increase cardiovascular risk. Chloride is slightly above normal but likely not clinically significant. Renal function, electrolytes, and triglycerides are within normal limits. Recommend review of glycemic and lipid management.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
